job.area_size_subtitle: Indicate the size or number of rooms affected
job.site_preparation_title: Make sure you have the right team size
job.site_preparation_subtitle: Indicating whether the site requires preparation e.g. clearing of land, house, room etc. helps our professionals right size the team for your job.
job.fixture_installation_title: What fixtures or fittings do you require?
job.fixture_installation_subtitle: Itemize any fittings to be completed as part of the job to enable a more accurate quote. It's okay if you are not sure, just let the professional know that they may have to also install some fixtures which you will let them know when you are ready.
job.is_new_construction_subtitle: Are you building a new house or having a specific issue with a new build or old house? Select one of the options and give more details in any other comments section.
job.material_supply_title: Make sure the job starts with all materials available.
job.material_supply_subtitle: Let the professional know whether you will have materials ready for them to start or they will have to provide a materials list as part of the quote.

job.what_job_subtitle: Choose the job type you want done. We use the job type to target the right professionals for quick response.
job.where_job_title: Let us know the address or location of the job.
job.where_job_subtitle: Try to be as close as possible (e.g. city and area) without revealing the exact address as this helps our professionals know whether it's a location they can easily serve.
job.when_job: When do you want the job to start?
job.when_job_title: Let's help you get the job done in time for you.
job.when_job_subtitle: Indicating how quickly you want it done will help in locating the right service provider available for your job at the time you want it.

job.what_need_subtitle: Select what you want the professionals to do for this job what do you need?.

job.upload_title: Upload files/photos (its better to upload photos to get better estimate)
job.upload_subtitle: Load any photos and relevant documents (e.g. site plan, architectural drawings, installation items etc.)
job.specify_rooms_subtitle: Select specific information about the type of job that further help narrow it down for the professional.
